name: Kwark
short_description: Kwark is a single player game about a creature that has to go through levels and then something impossible happens at the end! The game can be both from 1 person and from 3!
detailed_description:
Kwark is a single-player game in which you are a character named Kwark!
Your main task is to complete all levels, but it's not as easy as it seems!
A lot of levels available for passing, character customization, in-game currency and qualitatively made menu will not let you get bored.
In Kwark there is a large functionality of settings, such as: full screen mode, game graphics selection, sound settings and much more!
Kwark can run, jump, crouch, walk in a crouch and jump in a crouch, in general, everything you need for a comfortable game!
The game has a menu with a large number of buttons such as, mechanics, good design and elaborate interface!
And localization between Russian, English and Polish will allow you to play as you feel comfortable.
Also frequent updates won't let you get bored!
Can you pass all the levels?
